nodes.docs: Creates a Tempo payment method for usage on the client.
tags:
```ts
import { tempo } from 'mpay/client'
import { privateKeyToAccount } from 'viem/accounts'

const method = tempo({
  account: privateKeyToAccount('0x...'),
  rpcUrl: 'https://rpc.tempo.xyz',
})
```
